reviews.review_description: The only real reason it’s only a four star is because I think it should have some sort of melee attack, either a function or new weapon. The amount of times I’ve been surrounded by enemies while needing to reload and died is a little ridiculous, even just being able to knock them back with a slap would be good. Other than that good game, pretty quick rounds and good progression, would recommend.

This is a great game I play it for hours on end. It's not super fancy but it's still a good time, feels like an arcade shooter in a way. I do wish the reload buttons were on the second set of triggers or gesture controlled and I do wish that I didn't have to run backwards the whole time to be effective. But otherwise I have fun, it's a great little game.
Best game ever and the game is so fun to play and I can’t stop playing this game.

reviews.review_title: Great game but waiting for multiplayer
reviews.review_description: This is not your quick run through game . It take effort but isn’t so hard that you wanna give up . When the multiplayer starts hopefully there is a notification so I can get the family and friends in together to kick some butt !

I put in a lot of hours earning and maxing out the "gold rush" and "instant winner" perks, which do nothing, and pay out zero gold. Since in-game gold is worth real-world currency, that makes you scammers.  Thanks for nothing.

reviews.review_title: Love it, can't wait for some updates
reviews.review_description: This game is fun it does the basics super well. You really don't need to spend any real money to get all these power ups! The graphics in the game are far better than in the video they have in the review section.
😉😉😉😊🙃😊tfedhbhx

reviews.review_title: One of the best zombie games on here!
reviews.review_description: Spent countless hours on this game and love the grind and satisfaction it brings with choosing each pickup carefully! Would love to know when multiplayer is coming. To spend more time playing with a friend would be a chefs kiss
It’s a great game if you want something like quick horde survival with cool perks and weapons.
The game is amazing how ever two of the perks, insta win and gold rush do not work 😡 witch is very upsetting 😭 please fix this problem it would make this game so much more appealing.
This game is amazing. Can't wait till they get the multi-player mode. It's a great game if you like destroying blood sucking zombies.
I’m just sitting here waiting for multiplayer but it’s fun.
Beenwaiting for multiplayer forever!!! Please adddd!!! update ; it's 2026 and still no multiplayer

This is a very addicting game which never turns boring.
Tho the one thing that I see that needs fixing are the perks that involve gold none of them really work, like the  one you need to survive for 50 seconds to get 250 gold but the only gold I get is from killing the boss.

But other than that the game gives hours of fun and fast  paced gameplay.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! Regarding your comment about gold, we would like to clarify that gold can also be mined from all mobs in the game. In the meantime, we're glad to hear that you're enjoying the game and finding it addicting with hours of fun gameplay. We hope to continue providing you with an enjoyable experience in future updates. Thank you again for your support! 🤗

reviews.review_description: I was expecting to hop in for a few minutes and have a bit of fun. I ended up playing for hours, grinding progression and trying out new weapon/perk combos. I would happily increase my rating to 5 stars, but I ran into a pretty major issue. Weapon pickups don't work on the second stage. They either act like solid walls or you pass through them with no option to equip. It seems the devs are active in to reviews here; please fix this so I can get back to grinding! Lol

developer_response.body: Hi there! We're so glad to hear that you're loving the game and that it's keeping you entertained for hours! We appreciate your feedback about the weapon pickups on the second stage and we'll definitely look into fixing that issue as soon as possible. Thanks for playing and happy grinding! 😊

reviews.review_description: Ok so from a VR veterans point of view, gameplay is simple and to the point. However I was met with more than I expected. Full set of unlockable weapons even if there's not 100, a decent list of achievements and looks like we have 3 levels to choose from in this rouge like monster shoot em up. Power ups, health, different weapons pop up in battle, wave upon waves of various monsters, and there are grenade pick ups similar to COD zombies that nuke em all out. I don't mind the gameplay I was surprised and thought it was going to be much worse. Now for the real talk. We need smooth turning first off, I did not find an option for that, and there weren't many so I'm guessing it's not there. Height adjustment is nice if your sitting. We need manual reload or at least something like zombieland to speed things up a bit. Graphics are ok, it's a work in progress and I can see the love being put in here. Im gonna keep it in the library hopefully we'll see some updates soon 🤘😁

developer_response.body: Thank you for your detailed review of Monster Rampage. It's great to hear that as a VR veteran, you found the gameplay to be simple yet enjoyable. We appreciate your feedback regarding the need for smooth turning, manual reload, and graphics. We will definitely take these into consideration for future updates. Thank you for playing Monster Rampage and we hope to see you back in the game soon! 🤗

reviews.review_title: Good quality for a free game
reviews.review_description: I saw a video on youtube and decided to play. I was very surprised when I saw a more elaborate interface. And overall a more enjoyable game. I attach a link to the video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cF7oUI1HcFY

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts on Monster Rampage. We are glad to hear that you enjoyed playing the game and found it to be of good quality. We appreciate you sharing the video link and hope that you continue to have fun playing Monster Rampage. Thank you for your support! 😍

reviews.review_description: i like to crash zombies like this. played a lot, thank you! i wish more games were like this

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback on Monster Rampage! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the game and had fun crashing zombies. We appreciate your support and hope to continue providing you with enjoyable experiences in the future. If you have any suggestions or ideas for future games, please feel free to share them with us. Thank you for playing! 😇

reviews.review_description: Add multiplayer. It would make the game so much better.
Very fun and dynamic game, like these movements and fast diverse gameplay!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive feedback about the movements and fast diverse gameplay in Monster Rampage. We're glad to know that our efforts to create an exciting gaming experience are paying off! We hope that you will stay with us in the next updates.😇
